_comment: Game data for 'The House That Remembers'. Base schema by Owen, extended with optional messages for UI.
startingMessage:
You awaken in a mysterious mansion.
Your goal is to find a route to escape — explore rooms, examine objects, use items, talk to characters, pick up useful things, and combine objects to solve puzzles.
Try commands like 'go', 'examine', 'use', 'pick', 'drop', 'talk', and 'give' as you explore.
endingMessage: You slip through the window into the overgrown garden. The cold night air fills your lungs as you leave the haunted mansion behind. (Side Ending)

locations.name: EntranceHall
locations.description: A grand hall. A heavy red door blocks the library.
locations.message: You are now in the Entrance Hall.

connections.name: stairsUp
connections.description: A staircase leading up to the upstairs landing

connections.name: toDiningRoomDoor
connections.description: A door leading to the dining room

connections.name: toStudyRoomDoor
connections.description: A door leading to the study room

connections.name: toServantQuartersDoor
connections.description: A door leading to the servant quarters

locations.name: UpstairsLanding
locations.description: A quiet landing above the hall.
locations.message: You are now on the Upstairs Landing.

connections.name: stairsDown
connections.description: A staircase leading down to the entrance hall

connections.name: toStorageRoomDoor
connections.description: A door leading to the storage room

locations.name: StorageRoom
locations.description: A cramped storage room filled with old furniture and boxes.
locations.message: You squeeze into the Storage Room.

connections.name: backToUpstairsLanding
connections.description: A door leading back to the upstairs landing

connections.name: backToDiningRoom
connections.description: A door leading back to the dining room

connections.name: toStudyRoomDoor
connections.description: A door leading to the study room

locations.name: DiningRoom
locations.description: A long dining table under a dusty chandelier. Chairs lie overturned.
locations.message: You are now in the Dining Room.

connections.name: toKitchenDoor
connections.description: A door leading to the kitchen

connections.name: backToEntranceHall
connections.description: A door leading back to the entrance hall

connections.name: toLibraryDoor
connections.description: A door leading to the library

connections.name: toStorageRoomDoor
connections.description: A door leading to the storage room

locations.name: Kitchen
locations.description: A dark kitchen with a dripping faucet and scattered dishes.
locations.message: You step into the cold kitchen.

connections.name: backToDiningRoom
connections.description: A door leading back to the dining room

locations.name: StudyRoom
locations.description: A small study with scattered papers and a dusty desk.

connections.name: backToEntranceHall
connections.description: A door leading back to the entrance hall

connections.name: toServantQuartersDoor
connections.description: A door leading to the servant quarters

connections.name: toDiningRoomDoor
connections.description: A door leading to the dining room

connections.name: backToStorageRoom
connections.description: A door leading back to the storage room

locations.name: GardenExit
locations.description: Broken glass and overgrown ivy surround a shattered window leading outside.
locations.message: Cold night air seeps through the broken window.

locations.name: ServantQuarters
locations.description: Narrow beds line the wall. Old photos and a solid metal rod rest by the door.

connections.name: backToEntranceHall
connections.description: A door leading back to the entrance hall

connections.name: backToStudyRoomDoor
connections.description: A door leading to the study room

locations.name: Library
locations.description: Shelves of musty books and a faintly gleaming watch. There is a hidden passage to the study room.

connections.name: backToEntranceHall
connections.description: A door leading back to the entrance hall

connections.name: backToDiningRoomDoor
connections.description: A door leading to the dining room

connections.name: Secret Passage
connections.description: A hidden door leads to the study room

locations.name: SecretChamber
locations.description: A cramped, pitch-dark chamber. You sense something valuable here, but without a strong light, you can't see anything.
locations.message: The darkness is overwhelming. Maybe a bright light could reveal the chamber's secrets.

connections.name: backToLibraryDoor
connections.description: A door leading back to the library

objects.name: Open Door
objects.description: A heavy door now unlocked, leading to the library.

objects.name: Library Door
objects.description: A door to the library, now unlocked.

objects.name: Red Door
objects.description: A heavy red door blocks your way. It is locked and impassable without the right key.

objects.name: Old Map
objects.description: An old map covered in cryptic symbols. Some markings suggest a hidden route leading upstairs.

objects.name: Brass Key
objects.description: A small brass key, cold to the touch. It looks like it could open a locked door.

objects.name: Pocket Watch
objects.description: A worn pocket watch, its surface scratched but still ticking faintly. It seems to hold sentimental value.

objects.name: Bookshelf
objects.description: A large, heavy bookshelf. The wood grain on one side seems new, and there may be a hidden keyhole or mechanism.

objects.name: Secret Document
objects.description: A faded document that hints at the existence of a key to a hidden chamber.

objects.name: Library Key
objects.description: A small key given to you by the caretaker. It looks like it could unlock something important.

objects.name: Secret Chamber Key
objects.description: A mysterious key said to open a hidden chamber somewhere in the mansion.

objects.name: Treasure
objects.description: A box of old coins and a path out. But it's too dark to see anything clearly.

objects.name: Note
objects.description: A hint: 'Check the bookshelf.' The note simply reads: 'Check the bookshelf.' (Attributes: none)

objects.name: Silver Spoon
objects.description: A tarnished silver spoon left on the dining table. The spoon is cold and slightly bent. (Attributes: metal)

objects.name: Metal Rod
objects.description: A solid metal rod, slightly rusted but rigid — suitable for striking or levering. (Attributes: metal, hard, long, tool)

objects.name: Cup
objects.description: A chipped cup that can still hold water.
objects.message: The cup rattles faintly in your hand.

objects.name: Cup of Water
objects.description: A cup filled with cold water. The water ripples with each distant thunderclap. (Attributes: water)

objects.name: Rope
objects.description: A coiled rope, worn but sturdy. The rope smells faintly of dust and rain. (Attributes: tool, long)

objects.name: Glowing Lantern
objects.description: A restored lantern that shines with a steady, warm light. It can illuminate even the darkest corners.

objects.name: Stick
objects.description: A sturdy wooden stick, long and hard enough to pry open something. A stick that could be used as a lever. (Attributes: long, hard)

objects.name: Child's Emblem
objects.description: A small medal with a child's drawing. The emblem fits perfectly into the cabinet's slot.

objects.name: Faucet
objects.description: A dripping faucet that still runs. Cold water drips steadily into the sink. (Attributes: water_source)

objects.name: Old Cabinet
objects.description: A locked wooden cabinet covered in dust. There is a slot shaped like a child's emblem. There is something inside. (Contains: Glowing Lantern) (Attributes: furniture, locked)

objects.name: Mysterious Box
objects.description: A small box with a tight lid. Only something long and hard can pry it open. The box is tightly shut. You need something long and hard to pry it open. There is something inside. (Contains: Secret Key) (Attributes: container, locked)

objects.name: Secret Key
objects.description: A small rusty key that was hidden inside a box.

objects.name: Secret Chamber Door
objects.description: A heavy locked door leading to the secret chamber. The door is locked tight. Maybe a special key will open it. (Attributes: door, locked)

objects.name: Study Window
objects.description: A window that looks just big enough to escape through, but it's stuck. The glass looks old and brittle — something hard could break it to make an opening. (Attributes: window)

objects.name: Window Escape
objects.description: An opening through the window that leads to the garden. You can go through it to escape.

objects.name: Unlocked Box
objects.description: The box is now open. There is a secret key hidden inside.(Attributes: container, open)

characters.name: Caretaker
dialoguePhrases: Have you seen my pocket watch?
characters.noMoreDialogueMessage: The caretaker has nothing more to say.

characters.name: Lost Maid
characters.description: A pale maid who seems unsure if she is still alive.
dialoguePhrases: Have you seen a silver spoon?
I remember setting the table… then nothing.
The bookshelf in the library… it moves when unlocked.
characters.noMoreDialogueMessage: The maid fades, her voice only a memory.

characters.name: Ghostly Boy
characters.description: A faint ghost of a young boy sitting at the long table.
dialoguePhrases: I can't remember how I got here.
characters.noMoreDialogueMessage: The boy is gone. Only the echo of his voice remains.

useRules.name: fillCupAtFaucet
useRules.text: You fill the cup with cold water from the faucet.

useRules.name: unlockWithBrassKey
useRules.text: The key turns and the red door unlocks with a satisfying click. The way to the library is now open.

useRules.name: examineOldMap
useRules.text: The map shows a hidden passage behind the library bookshelf. An arrow suggests you should check the upstairs landing first.

useRules.name: pryBoxWithLongObject
useRules.text: You use the long and hard object to pry open the box. The box pops open!

useRules.name: useUnlockedBox
useRules.text: You search the unlocked box and find a secret key!

useRules.name: unlockSecretChamberWithSecretKey
useRules.text: You unlock the heavy door with the secret key. The way to the secret chamber is open!

useRules.name: breakWindowWithHardObject
useRules.text: You strike the window with the hard object. The brittle glass shatters with a crash and a safe opening is created — careful of the shards. Now use 'go Window Escape' to climb down and leave the mansion.

useRules.name: winWithLanternAndTreasure
useRules.text: You shine the glowing lantern on the treasure. The chest bursts open, spilling glittering riches — you have obtained the treasure and escape triumphant!

useRules.name: openCabinetWithEmblem
useRules.text: You press the child's emblem into the slot. It fits perfectly! The cabinet unlocks with a soft click, revealing a glowing lantern inside.

giveRules.name: givePocketWatchToCaretaker
giveRules.text: The caretaker beams. 'Thank you! Take this key to the hidden passage.'

giveRules.name: giveSilverSpoonToLostMaid
giveRules.text: The maid clutches the spoon and smiles. 'Thank you... Remember: the bookshelf requires a key to move.'

giveRules.name: giveCupOfWaterToGhostBoy
giveRules.text: The boy drinks silently, then fades. A small medal with a child's drawing (Child's Emblem) is left on the chair, glowing softly.

pick: You cannot pick up this item.
go: You move to the next location.
pickup: You cannot pick up this item.
inventory: You view the items in your inventory.
